disclaimer: Starter knowledge only. Not legal advice. Always verify against the latest Gazette notifications and qualified counsel.

acts.title: Contract Act, 1872
acts.summary: Core contract framework for offer, acceptance, lawful consideration, competent parties, consent, breach-linked obligations, and related commercial promises.

acts.title: Specific Relief Act, 1877
acts.summary: Useful when the remedy sought is not just damages, but injunctions or specific performance in civil disputes.

acts.title: Payment of Wages Act, 1936
acts.summary: Supports wage-timing and deduction related issue spotting in employment matters.

acts.title: Qanun-e-Shahadat Order, 1984
acts.summary: Important for evidence relevance, expert opinions, and admissibility themes when organizing digital records.

acts.title: Punjab Rented Premises Act, 2009
acts.summary: A key tenancy framework for Punjab dealing with tenancy agreements, obligations, and rent dispute procedures.

acts.title: Protection Against Harassment of Women at the Workplace Act, 2010 (as amended in 2022)
acts.summary: Relevant for workplace harassment complaint handling, internal process awareness, and escalation structure.

acts.title: Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act, 2016
acts.summary: Primary cybercrime statute for unauthorized digital acts, related offences, and investigation-linked pathways.

agencies.name: FIA Complaint Portal
agencies.notes: Useful when routing users toward structured complaint registration flows.

agencies.name: NCCIA
agencies.notes: Relevant for cyber complaint direction and awareness.
